package rulecoverage

func PositiveQueryPathAndBodyMergePerformedInHandler() string {
    ruleID := "query_path_and_body_merge_performed_in_handler"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Handlers that merge several request sources inline instead of normalizing inputs before service calls."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
